title: Bargaining Unit
content:
The man about to become a sparrow
    is shouting his head off
    wearing green trousers
    with red eyes framing mustier tweed,
    he lambasts the lad
    for not conducting
    his person properly
    in showing up for work
    in a white shirt.

    The fact the future labour
    requires only lifting boxes
    to a shed
    is a fine point
    about as important
    as the man himself
    who has transformed
    himself into that sparrow
    where several would not
    span the breadth of a
    bigger man's hand
    or four could be had
    in the Biblical sense
    for less than a penny.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Cameron Brown delivers a powerful performance in "Bargaining Unit"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
